item.label: [PKT-LFC-001](task-0045): Installed-State Detector
item.summary: Detect installed state of AUDiaGentic in a project

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-001](task-0035): Installed-State Detector

## Purpose

Detect installed state of AUDiaGentic in a project.

## Scope

- Detect installed vs not installed
- Detect version if installed
- Detect installation path

## Implementation

1. Define state detection logic
2. Implement detector
3. Add version detection

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Correctly detects installed state
2. Returns version when installed
3. Returns path when installed
